nasb.text: For John had been saying to Herod, “It is not lawful for you to have your brother’s wife.”

esv.text: For John had been saying to Herod, “It is not lawful for you to have your brother’s wife.”

cnv.text: 而約翰曾對希律說：“你佔有你兄弟的妻子是不合理的。”

ccb.text: 因为约翰屡次对希律说：“你娶弟弟的妻子不合法。”

csbs.text: 而约翰一直对希律说：“你占有自己兄弟的妻子是不可以的。”
